arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the collection.

kmsKeyArn.description: The ARN of the Amazon Web Services KMS key used to encrypt the collection.

createdDate.description: The Epoch time when the collection was created.

lastModifiedDate.description: The date and time when the collection was last modified.

collectionEndpoint.description: Collection-specific endpoint used to submit index, search, and data upload requests to an OpenSearch Serverless collection.

dashboardEndpoint.description: Collection-specific endpoint used to access OpenSearch Dashboards.

fipsEndpoints.description: FIPS-compliant endpoints for the collection. These endpoints use FIPS 140-3 validated cryptographic modules and are required for federal government workloads that must comply with FedRAMP security standards.

collectionEndpoint.description: FIPS-compliant collection endpoint used to submit index, search, and data upload requests to an OpenSearch Serverless collection. This endpoint uses FIPS 140-3 validated cryptography and is required for federal government workloads.

dashboardEndpoint.description: FIPS-compliant endpoint used to access OpenSearch Dashboards. This endpoint uses FIPS 140-3 validated cryptography and is required for federal government workloads that need dashboard visualization capabilities.

failureCode.description: A failure code associated with the request.

failureMessage.description: A message associated with the failure code.

accountSettingsDetail.description: OpenSearch Serverless-related details for the current account.

capacityLimits.description: The maximum capacity limits for all OpenSearch Serverless collections, in OpenSearch Compute Units (OCUs). These limits are used to scale your collections based on the current workload. For more information, see Managing capacity limits for Amazon OpenSearch Serverless.

AccessPolicyStats.description: Information about the data access policies in your account.

SecurityPolicyStats.description: Information about the security policies in your account.

SecurityConfigStats.description: Information about the security configurations in your account.

LifecyclePolicyStats.description: Information about the lifecycle policies in your account.

TotalPolicyCount.description: The total number of OpenSearch Serverless security policies and configurations in your account.

DataPolicyCount.description: The number of data access policies in the current account.

nextToken.description: When nextToken is returned, there are more results available. The value of nextToken is a unique pagination token for each page. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the collection.

vpcEndpointSummaries.description: Details about each VPC endpoint, including the name and current status.

nextToken.description: When nextToken is returned, there are more results available. The value of nextToken is a unique pagination token for each page. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page.

accountSettingsDetail.description: OpenSearch Serverless-related settings for the current Amazon Web Services account.

capacityLimits.description: The maximum capacity limits for all OpenSearch Serverless collections, in OpenSearch Compute Units (OCUs). These limits are used to scale your collections based on the current workload. For more information, see Managing capacity limits for Amazon OpenSearch Serverless.

effectiveLifecyclePolicyDetails.description: A list of lifecycle policies applied to the OpenSearch Serverless indexes.

effectiveLifecyclePolicyErrorDetails.description: A list of resources for which retrieval failed.

resource.description: The name of the OpenSearch Serverless index resource.

resourceType.description: The type of OpenSearch Serverless resource. Currently, the only supported resource is index.

retentionPeriod.description: The minimum number of index retention in days or hours. This is an optional parameter that will return only if it’s set.

noMinRetentionPeriod.description: The minimum number of index retention days set. That is an optional param that will return as true if the minimum number of days or hours is not set to a index resource.

lifecyclePolicyDetails.description: A list of lifecycle policies matched to the input policy name and policy type.

lifecyclePolicyErrorDetails.description: A list of lifecycle policy names and policy types for which retrieval failed.

policy.description: The JSON policy document without any whitespaces.

createdDate.description: The date the lifecycle policy was created.

lastModifiedDate.description: The timestamp of when the lifecycle policy was last modified.

vpcId.description: The ID of the VPC from which you access OpenSearch Serverless.

subnetIds.description: The ID of the subnets from which you access OpenSearch Serverless.

securityGroupIds.description: The unique identifiers of the security groups that define the ports, protocols, and sources for inbound traffic that you are authorizing into your endpoint.

failureCode.description: A failure code associated with the request.

failureMessage.description: A message associated with the failure code.

policy.description: The JSON policy document without any whitespaces.

lastModifiedDate.description: The timestamp of when the policy was last modified.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the collection.

kmsKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key with which to encrypt the collection.

standbyReplicas.description: Creates details about an OpenSearch Serverless collection.

lastModifiedDate.description: The date and time when the collection was last modified.

policy.description: The JSON policy document without any whitespaces.

createdDate.description: The date the lifecycle policy was created.

id.description: The unique identifier of the security configuration.

samlOptions.description: SAML options for the security configuration in the form of a key-value map.

metadata.description: The XML IdP metadata file generated from your identity provider.

userAttribute.description: A user attribute for this SAML integration.

groupAttribute.description: The group attribute for this SAML integration.

openSearchServerlessEntityId.description: Custom entity ID attribute to override the default entity ID for this SAML integration.

sessionTimeout.description: The session timeout, in minutes. Default is 60 minutes (12 hours).

iamIdentityCenterOptions.description: Describes IAM Identity Center options in the form of a key-value map.

instanceArn.description: The ARN of the IAM Identity Center instance used to integrate with OpenSearch Serverless.

applicationArn.description: The ARN of the IAM Identity Center application used to integrate with OpenSearch Serverless.

applicationName.description: The name of the IAM Identity Center application used to integrate with OpenSearch Serverless.

applicationDescription.description: The description of the IAM Identity Center application used to integrate with OpenSearch Serverless.

userAttribute.description: The user attribute for this IAM Identity Center integration. Defaults to UserId

groupAttribute.description: The group attribute for this IAM Identity Center integration. Defaults to GroupId.

iamFederationOptions.description: Describes IAM federation options in the form of a key-value map. Contains configuration details about how OpenSearch Serverless integrates with external identity providers through federation.

groupAttribute.description: The group attribute for this IAM federation integration. This attribute is used to map identity provider groups to OpenSearch Serverless permissions.

userAttribute.description: The user attribute for this IAM federation integration. This attribute is used to identify users in the federated authentication process.

lastModifiedDate.description: The timestamp of when the configuration was last modified.

lastModifiedDate.description: The timestamp of when the policy was last modified.

status.description: The current status in the endpoint creation process.
